.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved java.io.* import above java.net.* import

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant assignments for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in string constant assignments

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords in conditional statements to adhere to coding standards.
Reformatted the error message print statement for directory creation failure.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line System.out.println into a single line

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for new Authenticator() block

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Import CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers that prevent log injection attacks.
Refactor multi-line string concatenation in log statements to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Inject CRLF_SAFE_MARKER into log.info calls to sanitize log output against CRLF injection.
Update active profiles logging to fallback to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring accurate status reporting.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in the log message string to fix formatting or encoding issues.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict AsyncConfiguration bean registration to exclude specific test profiles to prevent conflicts during testing.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added @Profile("!testdev & !testprod") annotation to the AsyncConfiguration class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Update Hazelcast configuration API usage from manual map config registration to the newer addMapConfig method.
Refactor MapConfig initialization to use the constructor with the map name instead of relying on implicit default naming or manual registration keys.
Update annotation attribute syntax from implicit single-value to explicit array initializer.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import, likely because the dependency was removed or the module is no longer needed in this configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; and the problemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import, likely because the dependency was removed or the module is no longer needed in this configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; and the constraintViolationProblemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reordered constructor parameters to align with updated Spring Boot Liquibase integration conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider<DataSource> liquibaseDataSource after LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replaced deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to match the updated SpringLiquibase API.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a bean-based SecurityFilterChain configuration required for Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... return http.build(); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in newer Spring Security versions.
Migrate from antMatchers to requestMatchers in the authorization configuration to align with the new HttpSecurity DSL.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Configure the application as an OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support, replacing the custom JWTConfigurer.
Remove explicit configuration for Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, Feature-Policy, and Frame-Options headers which are no longer configured via HttpSecurity in this migration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed .headers() chain including contentSecurityPolicy, referrerPolicy, featurePolicy, and frameOptions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and ignore specific request matchers.
Add security rules for Swagger/OpenAPI documentation endpoints.
Inject JHipsterProperties into the security configuration, likely for future use or alignment with JHipster v8 standards.
Update servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Add support for allowed origin patterns in CORS configuration to handle wildcard origins more flexibly.
Update CORS registration paths to align with Swagger UI 3.x endpoints, removing deprecated v2 and resource paths.
